name: New Orleans Eggs
recipeInstructions:
4 large eggs
Salt and pepper
2 cups Choron Sauce (see next recipe)
2 tablespoons chopped parsley
2 tablespoons chopped green onion
8 Grit cakes (see next recipe)
1. In a shallow saucepan or skillet, bring 2 inches of cold water and vinegar to a boil over medium heat.
2. Reduce heat until the water simmers gently.
3. Break eggs one at a time into a ramekin or coffee cup, holding the ramekin as close to the water as possible.
4. Gently slip each egg into the water.
5. Poach the eggs for 3 minutes for very soft-cooked, or 5 minutes for medium-soft.
6. Using a slotted spoon, scoop out the eggs onto warmed plates.
7. If necessary, gently pat dry with paper towels.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Spoon several spoonfuls of Choron sauce over the eggs and decorate with parsley and green onions.
10. Serve with grit cakes.
Yield: 4 servings
